message:
fix(node): widen ResourceDelta fields from i64 to i128 for massive leak detection

Upgrades ResourceDelta struct fields from i64 to i128 to handle
extreme resource leak scenarios where delta values can exceed
i64::MAX (e.g., u64::MAX bytes allocated). Previously, casting
u64::MAX to i64 would silently truncate, making massive leaks
invisible to the detection logic.

Now casts resource values to i128 before arithmetic, preserving
full precision. Adds test resource_delta_detects_massive_leaks()
verifying that u64::MAX allocations are correctly detected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
